missions.name: The Safehouse Hand
missions.briefing: Friend — private safehouse of mine on a rock just flipped. Viroids in the vault, ledger inside the viroids, and the ledger is what I am paying you for. Standard hand: drop the lander with F, walk the bunker on foot, clear every room, come back up with what belongs to me. House rule applies — lose the shuttle, you lose the cargo with it. The Exchange does not insure freight that does not reach a counter. Ante up clean. — Maverick

missions.name: The Table Wants a Tell
missions.briefing: Friend, I have a buyer asking what the rock is really holding — not what the brochure says. Drop the lander with F, find the field terminal on the surface, and tag rocks with the SCI gun. Terminal calls the tell — that is the sample the table wants, no other. Bring it home. Clean read, clean hand. — Maverick
